name: Turtle Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces reduced fat nondairy whipped topping; thawed
1/4 cup Prepared fat-free hot fudge topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Melt margarine in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in graham cracker crumbs. Press the crumb mixture firmly onto the bottom of a 10-inch springform pan. Bake for 10 minutes and cool.
3. Place 1/2 cup cold water in a small saucepan; sprinkle gelatin over water. Let stand 3 minutes to soften. Heat gelatin mixture over low heat until completely dissolved, stirring constantly.
4. In a food processor or blender, combine cream cheese, cottage cheese, sugar, and vanilla. Process until smooth. Add the gelatin mixture and process until well blended. Fold in whipped topping.
5. Pour into prepared crust. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until set.
6. Loosen cake from rim of pan. Remove side of pan from cake. Drizzle caramel and hot fudge sauce over cheesecake (horizontal lines across the cake). Sprinkle pecans evenly over top before serving.
